de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class CcatchSVWrapper

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • recoder.java.statement.Branch
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.Ccatch
              • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.CcatchSVWrapper
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, NonTerminalProgramElement, ParameterContainer, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, StatementContainer, VariableScope, ModelElement

    public class CcatchSVWrapper
extends Ccatch
implements KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper

      • replaceChild

        public boolean replaceChild(ProgramElement p1,
                            ProgramElement p2)
        Description copied from class: Ccatch
        Replace a single child in the current node. The child to replace is matched by identity and hence must be known exactly. The replacement element can be null - in that case, the child is effectively removed. The parent role of the new child is validated, while the parent link of the replaced child is left untouched.
        Specified by:
        replaceChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Overrides:
        replaceChild in class Ccatch
        Parameters:
        p1 - the old child.
        Returns:
        true if a replacement has occured, false otherwise.
